DOMAIN_SEPARATOR().details: Always computed from the current execution context so proxy calls bind signatures      to the proxy address instead of the implementation address.

buyGood((uint8,address,uint256),(uint8,a.custom:security: Protected by reentrancy guard.Verifies EIP-712 signature if the caller is a relayer.Checks slippage tolerance against gross AMM output (`_swapQuantity.amount1()`).Validates that the pool has sufficient liquidity and is not frozen.
buyGood((uint8,address,uint256),(uint8,a.details: Executes a swap (buy) between two goods.

params._goodKey1: The address of the input good (selling).
params._goodKey2: The address of the output good (buying).
params._recipient: The address to receive the bought goods (if different from trader).                 Also used for referral tracking if different from trader.
params._swapQuantity: The swap details:        - amount0: The input quantity of _goodid1.        - amount1: The minimum gross output quantity of _goodid2 before any relayer execution fee.
params._trader: The address of the trader initiating the swap (must match signer if signature used).
params.data: Additional data for the input token transfer (Permit/Transfer).
params.external_info: External business metadata (e.g., payment order id or other extra info).
params.signature: The EIP-712 signature authorizing the trade (if msg.sender != _trader).

returns.good1change: The state change of the input good:         - amount0: Fee quantity deducted.         - amount1: Actual input quantity swapped.
returns.good2change: The state change of the output good:         - amount0: Fee quantity deducted.         - amount1: Gross output quantity from the AMM before any relayer execution fee.

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

params._TTS_Contract: The address of the official token contract

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

params.good: The address of the good to query

returns._0: goodstate The current state of the good,  goodConfig Configuration of the good, check goodconfig.sol or whitepaper for details  owner Creator of the good  currentState Present investQuantity, CurrentQuantity  investState Shares, value

params.proofid: The ID of the proof to query

returns._0: proofstate The current state of the proof,  currentgood The current good associated with the proof  valuegood The value good associated with the proof  shares normal good shares, value good shares  state Total value, Total actual value  invest normal good virtual quantity, normal good actual quantity  valueinvest value good virtual quantity, value good actual quantity

getRecentGoodState(uint256,uint256).details: Retrieves the current state of two goods in a single call

params.good1: The address of the first good to query
params.good2: The address of the second good to query

returns.good1currentstate: The current state of the first good, representing its latest trading iteration,amount0:good current value,amount1:good current quantity
returns.good2currentstate: The current state of the second good, representing its latest trading iteration,amount0:good current value,amount1:good current quantity

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

params._goodKey: The address of the ERC20 token representing the new good
params._initial: amount0: user-specified total value, amount1: token quantity to deposit
params._normaldata: The data for transferring the normal good (Permit/Transfer)
params._signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

investGood((uint8,address,uint256),uint2.details: The caller deposits only the target token; its credited value is derived from      the current pool price and scaled by the leverage factor (`enpower`).      Flow: isInvestBlocked (price guard) → transfer tokens in → compute virtual shares      → update good state → update/create proof → stake value to TTS.      Reverts with TTSwapError(47) if the deposit price exceeds the current pool price,      TTSwapError(38) if the resulting investment value is below the dust threshold.

params._goodKey: Address of the ERC-20 token (good) to invest in.
params._gooddata: Encoded transfer authorisation (plain approve / EIP-2612 / Permit2).
params._invest: Packed uint256 — amount0: credited value per unit, amount1: token quantity to deposit.
params._trader: Must equal `msg.sender` (enforced by `_checkTrader`); receives the investment proof context in events.
params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here (C-01 scheme B). Do not rely on relayer semantics.

params.goodid: ID of the good to check

returns._0: Whether the good's price is higher

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

queryCommission(uint256[],address).details: Queries commission amounts for multiple goods for a specific recipient

params._goodid: Array of good addresses to query commission for
params._recipient: The address to check commission amounts for

returns._0: feeamount Array of commission amounts corresponding to each good

refreshPromise(uint256).details: **C-01 / M-08**: No EIP-712 and **no relayer/meta-tx**; only the proof owner can call (enforced via `S_ProofKey(msg.sender, ...)`).      Integrators must not assume a signature or `_trader` parameter — caller MUST be `msg.sender`.

params._proofid: Proof id derived from `(msg.sender, currentgood, valuegood)`.

DOMAIN_SEPARATOR().notice: Returns the EIP-712 domain separator used by relayed entrypoints.

buyGood((uint8,address,uint256),(uint8,a.notice: This function calculates the swap amount based on the AMM formula, deducts fees, updates reserves, and transfers tokens.

cancelNonce().notice: Allows users to proactively increment the nonce to invalidate previously signed offline代付 signatures

changeGoodOwner(uint256,address,address,.notice: Changes the owner of a good

getGoodState(uint256).notice: Retrieves the current state of a good

getProofState(uint256).notice: Retrieves the current state of a proof

getRecentGoodState(uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves the current state of two goods in a single call

initGood((uint8,address,uint256),uint256.notice: Initialize a new good with single-token deposit at a user-specified price

investGood((uint8,address,uint256),uint2.notice: Add single-token liquidity to an existing good without pairing a value good.

ishigher(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Check if the price of a good is higher than a comparison price

lockGood(uint256,address,bytes).notice: Locks a good when the caller is market manager or good owner.

modifyGoodByManager(uint256,uint256,addr.notice: Allows market admin to modify a good's attributes

queryCommission(uint256[],address).notice: This function: - Returns commission amounts for up to 100 goods in a single call - Each amount represents the commission available for the recipient - Returns 0 for goods where no commission is available - Maintains gas efficiency by using a fixed array size

refreshPromise(uint256).notice: Emits `e_getPromiseProof` for applied goods when the caller is the good owner and proof matches `msg.sender`.
